summary: Extended tests/test_crypto.py from 45 to 112 tests covering all public API surface of suite-core/core/crypto.py. Added 7 new test classes (TestExceptionHierarchy, TestKeyMetadataExtended, TestAllKeySizes, TestSignVerifyEdgeCases, TestModuleLevelFunctions, TestGetPublicKeyPem) with tests for exception hierarchy, fingerprint SHA-256 verification, all 3 key sizes (2048/3072/4096), edge cases (empty/1MB/binary data, bit-flips, truncation, cross-key), module-level singletons, and key persistence. All 112 tests pass in 9.3s.
coverage_areas: RSAKeyManager.__init__ (all valid key sizes, invalid sizes)
RSAKeyManager lazy loading (private_key, public_key, metadata properties)
RSAKeyManager key generation and persistence (PEM files, permissions)
RSAKeyManager key reloading from private and public PEM files
RSAKeyManager error handling (bad PEM, non-RSA key types, EC keys)
RSASigner.sign (bytes return type, signature length, determinism)
RSAVerifier.verify (valid, tampered data, wrong key, wrong fingerprint)
rsa_sign module function (singleton creation and reuse)
Edge cases: empty bytes, single byte, null bytes, all 256 byte values, 1MB data
PKCS1v15 determinism, cross-key verification failure, bit-flip detection
